capabilities.description: Monitor search trends, community signals, and user behavior to identify unmet market needs
Validate an Opportunity Brief from Strategy with real market demand signals (keyword volume, community activity, competitor presence)
Produce SEO-optimized legal guides, social content, and email campaigns
Monitor competitors' digital presence: SEO positioning, content strategy, pricing, new features
Identify and develop partnerships with law firms, trade associations, and complementary platforms

skills.description: Collect and structure market signals following runbooks/market-signal-report.md

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Specific domain to focus signals on (e.g. 'LegalTech', 'HRTech')

skills.returns: { signals: Array<{ source: string, signal: string, strength: string }>, summary: string }

skills.description: Validate an opportunity brief with market demand data (keyword volume, community signals)

parameters.name: briefSummary
parameters.description: Summary of the opportunity to validate

skills.returns: { isValid: boolean, demandSignals: string[], competitorActivity: string, recommendation: string }
